description: Slide tiles and merge numbers to reach the 2048 tile! A highly addictive math-based brain-teaser.
instructions: Use Arrow keys or WASD to slide tiles. When two tiles with the same number collide, they merge into one with double the value!

title: Hextris
description: An intense, fast-paced puzzle game inspired by Tetris. Rotate the hexagon to match colored blocks before they reach the edge.
instructions: Use Left and Right arrow keys (or A and D) to rotate the hexagon. Stack blocks and match 3 or more of the same color to clear them.

title: Flappy Bird
description: The classic, ultra-challenging game of precise timing where you guide a flapping bird through retro green pipes.
instructions: Click the screen, tap, or press Spacebar to flap the bird's wings. Avoid crashing into the pipes or falling to the ground!
iframeTag: <iframe src="https://nebez.github.io/floppybird/" style="width:100%; height:100%; border:none; background-color:#4ec0ca;" allowfullscreen="true"></iframe>

title: Google Pacman
description: Play the legendary retro arcade maze game. Guide Pacman, munch on yellow pellets, and avoid the colorful ghosts!
instructions: Use Arrow keys to direct Pacman. Eat all dots in the maze to clear the level. Eat flashing Power Pellets to temporarily weaken and eat the ghosts.

title: Asteroids Classic
description: Command a lone spaceship in a dangerous, floating asteroid field. Blast space rocks and dodge enemy saucers.
instructions: Left/Right arrow keys (or A/D) to rotate. Up arrow (or W) to apply thrust. Spacebar to shoot laser cannons.
iframeTag: <iframe src="https://d9f9.github.io/asteroids/" style="width:100%; height:100%; border:none; background-color:#000000;" allowfullscreen="true"></iframe>

title: Chrome Dino Run
description: The famous offline retro runner. Speed across a prehistoric desert, leaping over cacti and dodging pterodactyls.
instructions: Press Spacebar or Up Arrow key to start and jump. Press Down Arrow key to duck. Speed increases as you travel farther.

title: Tower Stack
description: Align and stack moving construction blocks as high as you can. How tall can your architectural masterpiece get?
instructions: Press Spacebar, click, or tap to drop the swinging building block onto the tower. Keep it centered; misalignments shrink your block!

title: Classic Sudoku
description: Train your brain with Sudoku, the classic grid-based mathematical number game with multiple difficulties.
instructions: Fill the 9x9 grid. Each row, column, and 3x3 square must contain all digits from 1 to 9 exactly once.

title: Retro Snake (Built-In)
description: Our built-in neon snake game! Guided by smooth canvas frames and vibrant colors, this game is 100% unblocked and playable offline.
instructions: Use Arrow keys or WASD to navigate. Eat glowing energy items to grow and increase score. Do not crash into walls or your own tail!

title: Neon Tic-Tac-Toe
description: Play the timeless game of Tic-Tac-Toe natively on the site. Challenge our smart CPU AI or play local pass-and-play with a friend.
instructions: Select your marker (X or O). Take turns placing symbols on the 3x3 board. Secure three in a row to win!
